items.caption: A digital illustration depicting a stylized representation of the united states' immigration policy. the central focus is a map of the world with the united states highlighted in red, symbolizing the country's focus on immigration. overlaid on the map are numerous red figures, each representing an individual, which are scattered across the globe, suggesting the global reach of the united states' immigration policies. the figures are moving towards the united states, indicating the flow of people towards the country. the illustration is designed to convey the concept of immigration and the global impact of the united states' immigration policies.
